mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the housing market demand signal, as measured by HOUST, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate signal, as measured by UNRATE, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-unemployment periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the industrial production signal, as measured by INDPRO, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the retail sales signal, as measured by RSAFS, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in decline periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the monetary policy tightening signal, as measured by FEDFUNDS, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the labor market slack signal, as measured by PAYEMS, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in slack periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the GDP demand signal, as measured by GDPC1, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rising-demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the industrial production signal, as measured by INDPRO, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rising-production periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
